prompts: Alexander leaning back in a plush velvet armchair at an exclusive rooftop bar during golden hour. He is impeccably dressed in a dark, custom-tailored suit, holding a crystal glass of champagne. His smirk is visible as he looks slightly off-camera, conveying effortless superiority. Soft rim lighting highlights his slicked-back hair and the gleam of his expensive gold watch. Cinematic, high-end fashion photography style, shallow depth of field.

Alexander is standing near a modern sculpture, looking critically at it while maintaining intense eye contact with someone just out of frame. A candid street style photo in a metropolitan area (like Mayfair or Tribeca). At a lavish charity gala. Alexander is seen laughing genuinely (a rare moment) with a small group of well-dressed people. Nighttime shot at a sophisticated cocktail party in a dimly lit, exclusive club. Close-up shot focused on Sophie's hands: one hand cradling a takeaway coffee cup, the other lightly touching her phone screen. She is sitting near a sunlit window seat. Beach setting, late afternoon. Sophie is wearing an elegant, chic swimsuit (e.g., navy or deep red) covered by a sheer linen duster. Selfie taken by Nigel in front of a wall covered in standardized, uninteresting informational plaques (e.g., historical facts about local plumbing). Nigel standing near a large window overlooking an unremarkable suburban street during golden hour.
